ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "iso3" TEXT /* ISO 3-letter code for the country */,
  "territory_name" TEXT /* Name of the territory */,
  "regional_office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the regional office associated with the country */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current political status of the country */,
  "presence" TEXT /* Presence of an organizational office in the country */,
  "status_update_date" TEXT /* Date when the country's status was last updated */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_regional_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("regional_office_id") REFERENCES regional_offices ("regional_office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regional_offices" (
  "regional_office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regional office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the regional office */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the regional office */,
  "coverage_area" TEXT /* Area of coverage for the office */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for the regional office */,
  "contact_fax" TEXT /* Fax number for the regional office */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Operational status of the office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regional_office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the political status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the political status */,
  "description_en" TEXT /* Description of the status in English */,
  "description_fr" TEXT /* Description of the status in French */,
  "description_es" TEXT /* Description of the status in Spanish */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the office is located */,
  "office_type" TEXT /* Type of organizational office */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the office */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the office */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the office */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for the office */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Operational status of the office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offices_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "territories" (
  "territory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each territory */,
  "territory_name" TEXT /* Name of the territory */,
  "is_disputed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the territory is disputed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the territory and its significance */,
  "area_sq_km" INTEGER /* Area of the territory in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the territory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("territory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* User's IP address at the time of access */,
  "browser_type" TEXT /* User's browser type at the time of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries_regions" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region associated with the country */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_regions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the status the country had at a certain time */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the status changed */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason behind the status change */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who updated the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_history_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_history_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the notification */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
